chapter_title.ar: باب شَرْطِ مَنْ أُذِنَ لَهُ فِي أَعْمَالِهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 31 – The stipulations for the one who is allowed to be in their (government) workforce

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/69)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/69)
text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ لِلَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَعَ السُّلْطَانِ أَوْلِيَاءَ يَدْفَعُ بِهِمْ عَنْ أَوْلِيَائِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions, from Ali Bin Yaqteen who said,
‘Abu Al Hassan<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic as firends with the Sultan (ruling authority) by whom He<sup>azwj</sup> Defends His<sup>azwj</sup> friends’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people from Ali ibn Yaqtin who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once said to me, ‘Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has friends with the Sultan through whom He protects His friends.’”
